features.title: hk_china 真个股 vs proxy 决策级重跑(B091修复解锁; 修 B091-O1 close-NaN 残留 + matched top_n + 4 caveat)
features.acceptance: 【backlog hk-china-real-vs-proxy-decision-rerun; B090 signoff O2 + B091 signoff O1/O2 前置清单】(1)★修 B091-O1 close-NaN 残留: above_200d_ma 的 close=wide.iloc[-1] 遇 as_of 对某票是节假日→NaN→伪防守(真数据24季2季触发); 修=per-ticker 最后有效 close(ffill/dropna last), ★零回归 live US-only proxy 逐位不变(同 B091). (2)重跑 b090 retest with 修好因子 + **matched top_n**(真选N股/proxy选N ETF 同数对照). (3)携4 caveat 处理: SGOV floor 2020窗/26HK幸存者偏/matched top_n/close-NaN残留剔或修. 产出=真vs proxy 对照表(CAGR/Sharpe/MaxDD/参与率)+**GO/NO-GO verdict**(闸控 BL-B011-S2 Batch3 激活 hk_china live Master; NO-GO/INCONCLUSIVE合法). research-only. Gates: mypy trade+backend/根ruff/root pytest+backend test_strategies绿. Workflow-build(fresh子代理+对抗验证零回归+决策级诚实).
design_decisions: B091修复解锁真sleeve参与(0→~37%),首次可真测real vs proxy。
close-NaN残留=B091-O1 同类per-ticker日历问题(close非MA);修per-ticker最后有效close,零回归proxy。
4 caveat须诚实携带;窗口/幸存者限→verdict大概率INCONCLUSIVE/NO-GO合法(闸控Batch3)。

features.title: Codex 独立验收 + signoff(close-NaN修零回归/matched对照/4caveat诚实/GO-NO-GO裁定/proxy逐位不变)
features.acceptance: Codex独立: close-NaN修零回归(proxy US-only逐位不变+多日历修好)+matched top_n对照正确+4 caveat诚实携带+真vs proxy数字重算+GO/NO-GO裁定诚实(窗口/幸存者限→INCONCLUSIVE/NO-GO合法)+research-only零回归(不碰生产/Master live)+workbench test_strategies绿. signoff docs/test-reports/B093-...-signoff.md.
design_decisions: 最大陷阱=close-NaN修回归proxy或matched对照口径错;独立核实零回归+matched。
